items.name: AD_GROUP_ID
items.definition: Unique ID for your ad group

items.name: AD_ID
items.definition: Unique ID for your ad

items.name: CAMPAIGN_BOOKING_REFERENCE
items.definition: Campaign booking reference number

items.name: CAMPAIGN_DAILY_SPEND_CAP
items.definition: The maximum amount you're willing to spend in one day

items.name: CAMPAIGN_ID
items.definition: Unique ID for your campaign

items.name: CAMPAIGN_LIFETIME_SPEND_CAP
items.definition: The maximum amount you're willing to spend over the lifetime of your campaign

items.name: CAMPAIGN_NAME
items.definition: Name, objective and ID of your campaign

items.name: CAMPAIGN_OBJECTIVE_TYPE
items.definition: The objective you chose for your campaign (Awareness, Traffic, App installs, Catalog sales, Conversions or Video views)

items.name: CHECKOUT_ROAS
items.definition: Average return on ad spend for checkout events. This metric may include conversions that are modeled.

items.name: CLICKTHROUGH_1
items.definition: The total number of clicks on your Pin to content on or off of Pinterest

items.name: CLICKTHROUGH_1_GROSS
items.definition: Unfiltered number of times someone clicks your ad (paid)

items.name: CLICKTHROUGH_2
items.definition: Total number of Pin clicks from ads saved to another person's board

items.name: COST_PER_LEAD
items.definition: Average cost per lead from your ads

items.name: CPC_IN_MICRO_DOLLAR
items.definition: The cost per click in micro dollars

items.name: CPM_IN_DOLLAR
items.definition: Average cost per 1k paid impressions

items.name: CPM_IN_MICRO_DOLLAR
items.definition: Cost per thousand first-order impressions in micro dollars

items.name: CPW_IN_DOLLAR
items.definition: The cost per web session in dollars

items.name: CPW_IN_MICRO_DOLLAR
items.definition: The cost per web session in micro dollars

items.name: CTR
items.definition: Paid Pin clicks divided by paid impressions

items.name: CTR_2
items.definition: Earned Pin clicks divided by earned impressions

items.name: CUSTOM_ROAS
items.definition: Average return on spend for custom events. This metric may include conversions that are modeled.

items.name: ECPCV_IN_DOLLAR
items.definition: Average cost per video view that was watched to completion

items.name: ECPCV_P95_IN_DOLLAR
items.definition: Average cost per video that was watched until 95% of its length

items.name: ECPC_IN_DOLLAR
items.definition: Average cost per click

items.name: ECPC_IN_MICRO_DOLLAR
items.definition: Effective CPC (including first-order and downstream clicks) in micro dollars

items.name: ECPE_IN_DOLLAR
items.definition: Cost per engagement

items.name: ECPM_IN_MICRO_DOLLAR
items.definition: Effective CPM (including first-order and downstream impressions) in micro dollars

items.name: ECPV_IN_DOLLAR
items.definition: Average cost per video view

items.name: ECTR
items.definition: Total Pin clicks divided by total impressions

items.name: EENGAGEMENT_RATE
items.definition: Total engagements divided by total impressions

items.name: ENGAGEMENT
items.definition: The total number of engagements on your Pins. This includes saves, Pin clicks, outbound clicks, carousel card swipes, secondary creative (collections) clicks and Idea Pin forward/backward swipes.

items.name: ENGAGEMENT_1
items.definition: Paid actions taken as a result of your ads

items.name: ENGAGEMENT_2
items.definition: Earned actions from ads saved to boards

items.name: ENGAGEMENT_RATE
items.definition: Paid engagements divided by paid impressions

items.name: ENGAGEMENT_RATE
items.definition: The total engagements with your Pins divided by the total number of times your Pins were seen. Engagements include saves, Pin clicks, and outbound clicks.

items.name: IDEA_PIN_PAGE_BACKWARD_1
items.definition: The number of times someone goes back to a previous page within an Idea Pin you promoted

items.name: IDEA_PIN_PAGE_BACKWARD_2
items.definition: The number of times someone goes back to a previous page within your Idea Pin on someone else's board

items.name: IDEA_PIN_PAGE_FORWARD_1
items.definition: The number of times someone advances to a new page within an Idea Pin you promoted

items.name: IDEA_PIN_PAGE_FORWARD_2
items.definition: The number of times someone advances to a new page within your Idea Pin on someone else's board

items.name: IDEA_PIN_PRODUCT_TAG_VISIT_1
items.definition: The number of times someone taps on a product tagged within an Idea Pin you promoted
items.display_name: Paid Idea Pin product tag visits

items.name: IDEA_PIN_PRODUCT_TAG_VISIT_2
items.definition: The number of times someone taps on a product tagged within an Idea ad saved to another person's board
items.display_name: Earned Idea Pin product tag visits

items.name: IMPRESSION
items.definition: The number of times your Pins were on screen.

items.name: IMPRESSION_1
items.definition: The number of times your ad was seen

items.name: IMPRESSION_1_GROSS
items.definition: Unfiltered number of times your ad was on screen (paid)

items.name: IMPRESSION_2
items.definition: Total number of times your ad was viewed after being saved to another person's board

items.name: INAPP_CHECKOUT_COST_PER_ACTION
items.definition: Average cost per in-app checkout event

items.name: LEADS
items.definition: The number of times your ad achieved lead conversions

items.name: ORDER_LINE_ID
items.definition: Order Line ID associated with a campaign

items.name: ORDER_LINE_NAME
items.definition: Name of the Order Line associated with a campaign

items.name: OUTBOUND_CLICK
items.definition: The number of times people perform actions that lead them to a destination off Pinterest.

items.name: OUTBOUND_CLICK_1
items.definition: The total number of clicks to the destination URL associated with your ad

items.name: OUTBOUND_CLICK_2
items.definition: The total number of clicks to the destination URL associated with your ad saved to another person's board

items.name: OUTBOUND_CLICK_RATE
items.definition: The total number of clicks to the destination URL associated with your Pin divided by the total number of times your Pins were on screen.

items.name: PAGE_VISIT_COST_PER_ACTION
items.definition: Average cost per page visit event. This metric may include conversions that are modeled.

items.name: PAGE_VISIT_ROAS
items.definition: Average return on ad spend for page visit events. This metric may include conversions that are modeled.

items.name: PAID_IMPRESSION
items.definition: The number of impressions that you paid for

items.name: PINTEREST_CHECKOUT_COST_PER_ACTION
items.definition: Average cost per Pinterest checkout event

items.name: PINTEREST_CHECKOUT_ROAS
items.definition: Average return on ad spend for Pinterest checkout events

items.name: PIN_CLICK
items.definition: The total number of clicks on your Pin so it opens in closeup.

items.name: PIN_CLICK_RATE
items.definition: The total number of clicks from your Pin to content on or off Pinterest, divided by the total number of times your Pins were on screen.

items.name: PIN_ID
items.definition: Thumbnail of your ad's image or video

items.name: PIN_PROMOTION_ID
items.definition: Unique ID for your ad

items.name: QUARTILE_95_PERCENT_VIEW
items.definition: The number of times your video was viewed to 95% of its length.

items.name: QUIZ_COMPLETED
items.definition: The number of quiz completed for a given ad

items.name: QUIZ_COMPLETION_RATE
items.definition: Percentage of people who completed quizzes after answering question 1

items.name: QUIZ_PIN_RESULT_OPEN
items.definition: The number of total results opened for all quizzes

items.name: REPIN_1
items.definition: Total number of saves for your ad

items.name: REPIN_2
items.definition: Number of times your ad was saved from another person's board

items.name: REPIN_RATE
items.definition: Paid saves divided by paid impressions

items.name: SAVE
items.definition: The number of times people saved your Pin to a board.

items.name: SAVE_RATE
items.definition: The total saves of your Pins divided by the total number of times your Pins were on screen.

items.name: SHOWCASE_AVERAGE_SUBPAGE_CLOSEUP_PER_SESSION
items.definition: The number of total closeups for all cards divided by pin clicks

items.name: SHOWCASE_CARD_THUMBNAIL_SWIPE_BACKWARD
items.definition: The number of total swipes backward on card thumbnails
items.display_name: Total Showcase Card Thumbnail Swipe Backward

items.name: SHOWCASE_CARD_THUMBNAIL_SWIPE_FORWARD
items.definition: The number of total swipes forward on card thumbnails
items.display_name: Total Showcase Card Thumbnail Swipe Forward

items.name: SHOWCASE_PIN_CLICKTHROUGH
items.definition: The number of total outbound clicks from title pin
items.display_name: Total Showcase Title Pin Outbound Clicks

items.name: SHOWCASE_SUBPAGE_CLICKTHROUGH
items.definition: The number of total outbound clicks from all cards

items.name: SHOWCASE_SUBPAGE_CLOSEUP
items.definition: The number of total closeups for all cards
items.display_name: Total Showcase Card Closeups from Click

items.name: SHOWCASE_SUBPAGE_IMPRESSION
items.definition: The number of total impressions for all cards

items.name: SHOWCASE_SUBPAGE_REPIN
items.definition: The number of total saves for all cards

items.name: SHOWCASE_SUBPAGE_SWIPE_LEFT
items.definition: The number of total swipes forward for all cards

items.name: SHOWCASE_SUBPAGE_SWIPE_RIGHT
items.definition: The number of total swipes backward for all cards

items.name: SHOWCASE_SUBPIN_CLICKTHROUGH
items.definition: The number of total outbound clicks from all featured pins
items.display_name: Total Showcase Featured Pin Outbound Clicks

items.name: SHOWCASE_SUBPIN_IMPRESSION
items.definition: The number of total impressions for all featured pins

items.name: SHOWCASE_SUBPIN_REPIN
items.definition: The number of total saves for all featured pins

items.name: SHOWCASE_SUBPIN_SWIPE_LEFT
items.definition: The number of total swipes forward for all featured pins
items.display_name: Total Showcase Featured Pin Swipe Forward

items.name: SHOWCASE_SUBPIN_SWIPE_RIGHT
items.definition: The number of total swipes backward for all featured pins
items.display_name: Total Showcase Featured Pin Swipe Backward

items.name: SPEND_IN_DOLLAR
items.definition: Total amount you've spent during the reporting time period

items.name: SPEND_IN_MICRO_DOLLAR
items.definition: The money you spend for promoted Pins, in micro dollars

items.name: SPEND_IN_MICRO_US_DOLLAR
items.definition: The money you spend for promoted Pins, in micro USD

items.name: SPEND_IN_US_DOLLAR
items.definition: Total amount you've spent during the reporting time period (in USD)

items.name: TOTAL_ADD_TO_CART_CONVERSION_RATE
items.definition: The number of conversions per the number of total ad impressions that can be tracked to a conversion during the same time period.

items.name: TOTAL_CHECKOUT
items.definition: Total number of checkout events that resulted from interactions with your ad. This metric may include conversions that are modeled.

items.name: TOTAL_CHECKOUT_CONVERSION_RATE
items.definition: The number of conversions per the number of total ad impressions that can be tracked to a conversion during the same time period.

items.name: TOTAL_CHECKOUT_VALUE_IN_MICRO_DOLLAR
items.definition: Total value of checkout events resulting from interactions with your ad. This metric may include conversions that are modeled.

items.name: TOTAL_CLICKTHROUGH
items.definition: The total number of clicks on your Pin to content on or off of Pinterest (paid and earned)

items.name: TOTAL_CLICK_ADD_TO_CART
items.definition: The number of add to cart events resulting from clicks on your ad. This metric may include conversions that are modeled.

items.name: TOTAL_CLICK_CHECKOUT
items.definition: Total number of checkout events resulting from clicks on your ad. This metric may include conversions that are modeled.

items.name: TOTAL_CLICK_CHECKOUT_VALUE_IN_MICRO_DOLLAR
items.definition: Total value of checkout events resulting from clicks on your ad. This metric may include conversions that are modeled.

items.name: TOTAL_CLICK_LEAD
items.definition: Total number of lead events resulting from clicks on your ad. This metric may include conversions that are modeled.

items.name: TOTAL_CLICK_SIGNUP
items.definition: Number of signup events resulting from clicks on your ad. This metric may include conversions that are modeled.

items.name: TOTAL_CLICK_SIGNUP_VALUE_IN_MICRO_DOLLAR
items.definition: Total value of signup events resulting from clicks on your ad. This metric may include conversions that are modeled.

items.name: TOTAL_CONVERSIONS
items.definition: Total number of conversions for all event types using the Pinterest Tag integration after an ad interaction. This metric may include conversions that are modeled.

items.name: TOTAL_CUSTOM
items.definition: Total number of custom events resulting from interactions with your ad. This metric may include conversions that are modeled.

items.name: TOTAL_CUSTOM_CONVERSION_RATE
items.definition: The number of conversions per the number of total ad impressions that can be tracked to a conversion during the same time period.

items.name: TOTAL_CUSTOM_VALUE_IN_MICRO_DOLLAR
items.definition: Total value of custom events resulting from interactions with your ad. This metric may include conversions that are modeled.

items.name: TOTAL_ENGAGEMENT
items.definition: The total number of engagements on your ads, including clicks, saves, carousel swipes, and collections secondary saves

items.name: TOTAL_ENGAGEMENT_CHECKOUT
items.definition: Total number of checkout events resulting from engagements with your ad. Engagements includes saves, closeups, carousel swipes, collection secondary closeups, and collection secondary saves. This metric may include conversions that are modeled.

items.name: TOTAL_ENGAGEMENT_CHECKOUT_VALUE_IN_MICRO_DOLLAR
items.definition: Total value of checkout events resulting from engagements with your ad. Engagements includes saves, closeups, carousel swipes, collection secondary closeups, and collection secondary saves. This metric may include conversions that are modeled.

items.name: TOTAL_ENGAGEMENT_LEAD
items.definition: Total number of lead events resulting from engagement with your ad. Engagements includes saves, closeups, carousel swipes, collection secondary closeups, and collection secondary saves. This metric may include conversions that are modeled.

items.name: TOTAL_ENGAGEMENT_SIGNUP
items.definition: Total number of signup events resulting from engagements with your ad. Engagements includes saves, closeups, carousel swipes, collection secondary closeups, and collection secondary saves. This metric may include conversions that are modeled.

items.name: TOTAL_ENGAGEMENT_SIGNUP_VALUE_IN_MICRO_DOLLAR
items.definition: Total value of signup events resulting from engagements with your ad. Engagements includes saves, closeups, carousel swipes, collection secondary closeups, and collection secondary saves. This metric may include conversions that are modeled.

items.name: TOTAL_IDEA_PIN_PAGE_BACKWARD
items.definition: The total number of times someone goes back to a previous page within an Idea Pin, including paid and earned

items.name: TOTAL_IDEA_PIN_PAGE_FORWARD
items.definition: The total number of times someone advances to a new page within an Idea Pin, including paid and earned

items.name: TOTAL_IDEA_PIN_PRODUCT_TAG_VISIT
items.definition: The number of times someone taps on a product tagged within an Idea Pin, paid and earned.
items.display_name: Total Idea Pin product tag visits

items.name: TOTAL_IMPRESSION
items.definition: Number of times someone saw your ad (paid and earned)

items.name: TOTAL_IMPRESSION_FREQUENCY
items.definition: The average number of times each user saw your ad.

items.name: TOTAL_IMPRESSION_USER
items.definition: Total number of unique users who saw your ads

items.name: TOTAL_LEAD
items.definition: Total number of lead events resulting from interactions with your ad. This metric may include conversions that are modeled.

items.name: TOTAL_LEAD_CONVERSION_RATE
items.definition: The number of conversions per the number of total ad impressions that can be tracked to a conversion during the same time period.

items.name: TOTAL_OFFLINE_CHECKOUT
items.definition: Total number of offline checkout events resulting from clicks on your ad

items.name: TOTAL_PAGE_VISIT
items.definition: Total number of page visit events resulting from interactions with your ad. This metric may include conversions that are modeled.

items.name: TOTAL_PAGE_VISIT_CONVERSION_RATE
items.definition: The number of conversions per the number of total ad impressions that can be tracked to a conversion during the same time period.

items.name: TOTAL_PINTEREST_CHECKOUT
items.definition: Total number of Pinterest checkout events resulting from clicks on your ad

items.name: TOTAL_PINTEREST_CHECKOUT_VALUE_IN_MICRO_DOLLAR
items.definition: Total value of Pinterest checkout events resulting from interactions with your ad

items.name: TOTAL_REPIN_RATE
items.definition: Total saves divided by total impressions

items.name: TOTAL_SEARCH_CONVERSION_RATE
items.definition: The number of conversions per the number of total ad impressions that can be tracked to a conversion during the same time period.

items.name: TOTAL_SIGNUP
items.definition: Total number of signup events resulting from interactions with your ad. This metric may include conversions that are modeled.

items.name: TOTAL_SIGNUP_CONVERSION_RATE
items.definition: The number of conversions per the number of total ad impressions that can be tracked to a conversion during the same time period.

items.name: TOTAL_SIGNUP_VALUE_IN_MICRO_DOLLAR
items.definition: Total value of signup events resulting from interactions with your ad. This metric may include conversions that are modeled.

items.name: TOTAL_UNKNOWN_CONVERSION_RATE
items.definition: The number of conversions per the number of total ad impressions that can be tracked to a conversion during the same time period.

items.name: TOTAL_VIDEO_3SEC_VIEWS
items.definition: Total number of times your video ad played continuously for at least 3 seconds while 50% visible (paid and earned)

items.name: TOTAL_VIDEO_AVG_WATCHTIME_IN_SECOND
items.definition: Averaged across all videos that begin playback, including seeks and loops. Start time triggered when video begins playback.

items.name: TOTAL_VIDEO_MRC_VIEWS
items.definition: Total number of times your video ad played continuously for at least 2 seconds while 50% visible (paid and earned)

items.name: TOTAL_VIDEO_P0_COMBINED
items.definition: Total number of times your video ad started playing (paid and earned)

items.name: TOTAL_VIDEO_P100_COMPLETE
items.definition: Total number of times your video ad played 100% of its length, including views that skipped ahead to this point (paid and earned)

items.name: TOTAL_VIDEO_P25_COMBINED
items.definition: Total number of times your video ad played 25% of its length, including views that skipped ahead to this point (paid and earned)

items.name: TOTAL_VIDEO_P50_COMBINED
items.definition: Total number of times your video ad played 50% of its length, including views that skipped ahead to this point (paid and earned)

items.name: TOTAL_VIDEO_P75_COMBINED
items.definition: Total number of times your video ad played 75% of its length, including views that skipped ahead to this point (paid and earned)

items.name: TOTAL_VIDEO_P95_COMBINED
items.definition: Total number of times your video ad played 95% of its length, including views that skipped ahead to this point (paid and earned)

items.name: TOTAL_VIEW_ADD_TO_CART
items.definition: Total number of add to cart events resulting from views of your ad. This metric may include conversions that are modeled.

items.name: TOTAL_VIEW_CATEGORY_CONVERSION_RATE
items.definition: The number of conversions per the number of total ad impressions that can be tracked to a conversion during the same time period.

items.name: TOTAL_VIEW_CHECKOUT
items.definition: Total number of checkout events resulting from views of your ad. This metric may include conversions that are modeled.

items.name: TOTAL_VIEW_CHECKOUT_VALUE_IN_MICRO_DOLLAR
items.definition: Total value of checkout events resulting from views of your ad. This metric may include conversions that are modeled.

items.name: TOTAL_VIEW_LEAD
items.definition: Total number of lead events resulting from views of your ad. This metric may include conversions that are modeled.

items.name: TOTAL_VIEW_SIGNUP
items.definition: Number of signup events resulting from views of your ad. This metric may include conversions that are modeled.

items.name: TOTAL_VIEW_SIGNUP_VALUE_IN_MICRO_DOLLAR
items.definition: Total value of signup events resulting from views of your ad. This metric may include conversions that are modeled.

items.name: TOTAL_WATCH_VIDEO_CONVERSION_RATE
items.definition: The number of conversions per the number of total ad impressions that can be tracked to a conversion during the same time period.

items.name: TOTAL_WEB_CHECKOUT
items.definition: Total number of web checkout events resulting from clicks on your ad. This metric may include conversions that are modeled.

items.name: TOTAL_WEB_CHECKOUT_VALUE_IN_MICRO_DOLLAR
items.definition: Total value of web checkout events resulting from interactions with your ad. This metric may include conversions that are modeled.

items.name: TOTAL_WEB_CLICK_CHECKOUT
items.definition: Total number of web checkout events resulting from clicks on your ad. This metric may include conversions that are modeled.

items.name: TOTAL_WEB_CLICK_CHECKOUT_VALUE_IN_MICRO_DOLLAR
items.definition: Total value of web checkout events resulting from clicks on your ad. This metric may include conversions that are modeled.

items.name: TOTAL_WEB_ENGAGEMENT_CHECKOUT
items.definition: Total number of web checkout events resulting from engagements with your ad (save, closeup or carousel swipe). This metric may include conversions that are modeled.

items.name: TOTAL_WEB_ENGAGEMENT_CHECKOUT_VALUE_IN_MICRO_DOLLAR
items.definition: Total value of web checkout events resulting from engagements with your ad (save, closeup or carousel swipe). This metric may include conversions that are modeled.

items.name: TOTAL_WEB_SESSIONS
items.definition: Total number of sessions loaded in a browser

items.name: TOTAL_WEB_VIEW_CHECKOUT
items.definition: Total number of web checkout events resulting from views of your ad. This metric may include conversions that are modeled.

items.name: TOTAL_WEB_VIEW_CHECKOUT_VALUE_IN_MICRO_DOLLAR
items.definition: Total value of web checkout events resulting from views of your ad. This metric may include conversions that are modeled.

items.name: VIDEO_10S_VIEW
items.definition: The number of times your video was viewed for at least 10 seconds.

items.name: VIDEO_3SEC_VIEWS_2
items.definition: The number of times your video ad played continuously for 3 seconds while 50% in view after being saved to another person's board

items.name: VIDEO_AVG_WATCH_TIME
items.definition: The average time someone spent playing the video and static image cards included in your pin.

items.name: VIDEO_LENGTH
items.definition: Runtime of your video ad

items.name: VIDEO_MRC_VIEW
items.definition: The amount of views for at least 2 seconds with 50% of video in view.

items.name: VIDEO_MRC_VIEWS_2
items.definition: The number of times your video ad played continuously for 2 seconds while 50% in view after being saved to another person's board

items.name: VIDEO_P0_COMBINED_2
items.definition: Total number of times your video ad started playing after it was saved to another person's board

items.name: VIDEO_P100_COMPLETE_2
items.definition: Total number of times your video ad reached 100% of its length after it was saved to another person's board, including views that skipped ahead to this point

items.name: VIDEO_P25_COMBINED_2
items.definition: Total number of times your video ad reached 25% of its length after it was saved to another person's board, including views that skipped ahead to this point

items.name: VIDEO_P50_COMBINED_2
items.definition: Total number of times your video ad reached 50% of its length after it was saved to another person's board, including views that skipped ahead to this point

items.name: VIDEO_P75_COMBINED_2
items.definition: Total number of times your video ad reached 75% of its length after it was saved to another person's board, including views that skipped ahead to this point

items.name: VIDEO_P95_COMBINED_2
items.definition: Total number of times your video ad reached 95% of its length after it was saved to another person's board, including views that skipped ahead to this point

items.name: VIDEO_START
items.definition: Total number of video starts.

items.name: VIDEO_V50_WATCH_TIME
items.definition: The total play time for your video in minutes.

items.name: WEB_CHECKOUT_COST_PER_ACTION
items.definition: Average cost per web checkout event. This metric may include conversions that are modeled.

items.name: WEB_CHECKOUT_ROAS
items.definition: Average return on ad spend for web checkout events. This metric may include conversions that are modeled.

items.name: WEB_SESSIONS_1
items.definition: Number of paid sessions loaded in a browser

items.name: WEB_SESSIONS_2
items.definition: Number of earned sessions loaded in a browser
